name: Steps
description: A step indicator component for displaying multi-step processes with current progress and status.
usage_guidelines: Use for multi-step forms, wizards, or processes.
Set current to indicate active step (0-indexed).
Use status to show overall process state.
Compose with StepItem components for each step.
Use vertical prop for vertical layouts.

onChange.description: Callback fired when step is clicked.

styling_info.visual_description: A horizontal or vertical sequence of steps with connecting lines. Completed steps show checkmarks, current step is highlighted, pending steps are muted. Error state shows red indicator.

Dont: Don't use for too many steps (>7)
Don't forget to validate before progressing
